title: THETA Control Room — Build Hook Delta

changedProjects.lastKnownStatus: Build hook reported latest project state.
changedProjects.nextAction: v0.4.25 — LIMITER v3: CLEAN LIMITS AT THE LIMIT KNOB (DSP CHANGE, user-approved). ROOT CAUSE of 'GR no longer working': CLEAN is the default (MASTER_DIRTY off) and under LIMITER v2 the CLEAN path called processStereoDelayOnly() — pure latency delay, NO limiting — then hard-stored limiterGR=0. So the LIMIT knob was inert and the GR meter could never move unless DIRTY was engaged (screenshot: -7.6 dB ceiling, +11.6 dB output, GR dead). Was NOT caused by the v0.4.24 metering work. FIX: DSPVersion::LIMITER 2 -> 3; CLEAN now runs the same lookahead limiter DIRTY uses, at the knob threshold, and reports real GR. processStereo is a transparent peak limiter (console colour is applied upstream), so CLEAN stays clean. FROZEN: v2 keeps delay-only, v1 keeps the 0.999-clamped transfer, keyless states still default to v1 — old sessions/presets recall unchanged. AUTO LEVEL is live again in CLEAN on v3 (only frozen v2 keeps it off). The LIMIT tile red glow was already wired to limiterGR (6 dB = full) and now lights. VERIFY IN ABLETON: with DIRTY OFF, pull LIMIT down and confirm the GR meter moves, the audio is actually limited, and the LIMIT tile burns red as it clamps; then load an OLD session/preset and confirm it recalls with its previous (non-limiting) behaviour. OPEN: painted-metal chassis fork; deferred patina surfaces.
